title: Kidplokio Pink Fairytale Tea Party Pretend Playset 17pc Girls Toys Ages 3 and Up
description:
Does your child absolutely love fairies and tea parties? Then the Fairytale Tea Party Set is a wonderful gift idea! This cute fairy-themed set comes with everything your daughter needs to host a classic tea party with friends and stuffed animals: cups, saucers, spoons, tea pot, sugar bowl, cream jug, and pretend play cookies. This super-cute tea party set features vibrant colors that will engage your child and inspire them to use their imagination during playtime

Kidplokio Pink Fairytale Tea Party Pretend Playset 17pc Girls Toys Ages 3 and Up

Does your child absolutely love fairies and tea parties? Then the Fairytale Tea Party Set is a wonderful gift idea! This cute fairy-themed set comes with everything your daughter needs to host a classic tea party with friends and stuffed animals: cups, saucers, spoons, tea pot, sugar bowl, cream jug, and pretend play cookies.

Key Features

  • 17PC FAIRYTALE TEA PARTY - Kidplokio girls’ tea party play set features a fun fairytale theme; includes all tea utensils and accessories needed for a classic tea party: cups, saucers, spoons, tea pot, sugar bowl, cream jug, and pretend play cookies
  • ENCOURAGES IMAGINATION - Cute tea party set features vibrant colors that will inspire your child’s imagination; hosting tea parties encourages kids to use their creativity, fine motor skills, and teaches the importance of sharing with their friends
  • SAFE AND DURABLE - Made of durable, high-quality plastic, all accessories included are safe for children ages 3 and up; easy to clean, just wipe toys down with mild soap and pat or air dry in between uses; ok for use during bath time!
  • PORTABLE PLAY SET - Tea party accessories come inside of a sturdy box with specific slots for each toy; set can easily be packed up after use and brought over to play dates, birthday parties, or sleepovers; keep toys stored safely and organized when not in use
  • SPECIFICATIONS - Material: plastic; Colors: (fairytale-themed) blue, pink, yellow, green, purple; Number of pieces: 17, Dimensions of box: 15” x 11” x 2” ; Weight: .85 pounds (13.6 ounces); Recommended age: girls ages 3 and up

Product Specifications

  • MPN: LST230219TS
  • UPC: 810058489715
  • Color: Pink
  • Size: 17pc

This super-cute tea party set features vibrant colors that will engage your child and inspire them to use their imagination during playtime. Hosting tea parties is a great way to encourage kids to use their creativity, practice fine motor skills while pouring and serving tea, and also teach the importance of sharing with their tea party guests!

Made of durable, high-quality plastic, all of the 17 accessories included in the set are safe for children ages 3 and up with parental supervision. The toys are easy to clean too - just wipe them down with mild soap and water, and pat or air dry in between uses. Since they’re made of plastic, these toys are also okay for bath time!

The tea party set comes inside of a sturdy box that is ready to be gift-wrapped for birthdays, Christmas, or other special occasions. Inside the box are plastic slots for each toy so they can be safely stored and organized when not in use so you don’t have to worry about a big mess after playtime. Make sure to grab one of these tea party sets for your child this holiday season!
